key_observations: The highest revenue was recorded in Q1 at $42 million.
The lowest revenue occurred in Q3, with a value of $7 million.
Revenue decreased from Q1 to Q3, then increased in Q4.
The revenue in Q2 was $18 million.
The revenue in Q4 was $23 million.
structured.summary: This bar chart displays the quarterly revenue in millions of dollars for the year 2026. The revenue fluctuates significantly throughout the year, starting at a high of $42 million in Q1, dropping to its lowest point of $7 million in Q3, and then recovering to $23 million in Q4. The third quarter is distinctly lower than the others and is highlighted in a different color.
structured.title: Quarterly Revenue 2026 ($M)

summary: This bar chart displays the quarterly revenue in millions of dollars for the year 2026. The revenue fluctuates significantly throughout the year, starting at a high of $42 million in Q1, dropping to its lowest point of $7 million in Q3, and then recovering to $23 million in Q4. The third quarter is distinctly lower than the others and is highlighted in a different color.
